str.authority: Hvidvasksekretariatet (Money Laundering Secretariat) / Danish State Prosecutor for Serious Economic and International Crime (SØIK)
str.notes: Suspicious transaction reports must be filed immediately upon forming suspicion. VASPs registered with Finanstilsynet are reporting entities under the Anti-Money Laundering Act (Hvidvaskloven). Filed via SØIK's electronic reporting portal.
